ground_truth.title: 8 Best Moving Companies in Erie, PA - Today's Homeowner
ground_truth.author: Today's Homeowner Local Experts
ground_truth.main_content: Moving is often considered one of the most stressful life events that people go through. Even if you live in a smaller town (like Erie) with less crowded streets, you might be concerned about navigating around with a cumbersome moving truck. When temperatures can get colder than in many places, it could affect the ease of your move and cause more stress. You can reduce your stress with our carefully crafted guide to Erie's best movers, who can help you make your move hassle-free. The top 8 moving companies in Erie include: Dan's Moving & Storage Inc (Our Rating: 3.9/5, User Rating: 4.1/5) located at 211 W 2nd St, Dunkirk, NY 14048, phone (716) 366-7642, offering long distance, residential moving, packing, storage, and international services with punctual service and good customer service. B F Fields Moving & Storage (Our Rating: 3.8/5, User Rating: 4.6/5) at 945 Downing Ave, Erie, PA 16511, phone (814) 454-2481, offering international, storage, appliances, interstate, residential moving, long distance, and packing. Tri State Moving Service (Our Rating: 3.8/5, User Rating: 4.5/5) at 522 E 10th St, Erie, PA 16503, phone (814) 881-9085, specializing in hot tubs, gun safe, packing, residential moving, pianos, storage, and art and antiques. Diversified Moving & Storage, LLC dba Carney McNicholas (Our Rating: 3.5/5, User Rating: 4.6/5) at 5915 Burnett East Rd, Kinsman, OH 44428, phone (330) 792-5460. Big Box Rentals by Birkmire (Our Rating: 3.4/5, User Rating: 4.6/5) at 7400 Birkmire Dr, Fairview, PA 16415, phone (814) 833-5855. Truesdell Moving (Our Rating: 3.3/5, User Rating: 4.8/5) at 4611 S Ridge Rd W, Ashtabula, OH 44004, phone (440) 319-9292. Ahlgren's Trucking & Courier (Our Rating: 3.2/5, User Rating: 5.0/5) at 318 Ericsson Rd, Kennedy, NY 14747, phone (716) 267-4862. Zoom Movers (Our Rating: 3.1/5, User Rating: 4.8/5) at 2326 State St, Erie, PA 16503, phone (814) 459-9590. The first step in picking a company is determining if you're better off with a national or local mover. You also will need to choose between a full-service or self-service moving company. Full-service companies also provide packing and loading services, while self-service companies do not. The type of company that is best for you will depend on your budget and how badly you want to avoid packing boxes. In Erie, the normal hourly cost for movers is $97 an hour on average for two movers and a truck, ranging from $72 to $121. Typical costs by house size are: One bedroom about $3,746, Two bedrooms about $4,271, Three bedrooms about $4,888. FAQs address top moving companies, ranking methodology, best time to move (summer months to avoid icy roads), verifying mover reputation, moving large items like pianos or antiques, average cost of living index (89.9), and housing costs (median home price $168,596, average monthly rent $957).
with: We've determined the top mover in your area to be Dan's Moving & Storage Inc.
Moving during summertime will likely be more expensive, due to how many people move during this time.
The normal hourly cost for movers is: Average $97 an hour for two movers and a truck, Range $72 to $121 an hour.
The median home price in Erie is $168,596, while the average monthly rent is about $957.
We look at the following key factors in determining who should top our list: Company Experience, Real User Reviews, Company Reputation, Accreditations and Licenses, Service Area, Customer Service.
